options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: slots_to_lock
options.description: A list of slot player names to add a lock item to

options.name: slots_whitelist
options.description: If the list of slots to lock should be treated as a blacklist rather than a whitelist. If true, will lock every slot listed. If false, will lock every slot except this one and any slot listed.

options.name: unlock_item_copies
options.description: Number of copies of each unlock item to include.

options.name: unlock_item_filler
options.description: Number of additional locations for the world unlock slots. This amount is capped to 10, and automatically includes any copies of the bonus item key plus the additional locations here. The additional locations each add a Nothing item to the pool.

options.name: bonus_item_slots
options.description: Number of bonus item slots to include. These will be automatically unlocked when sent their individual keys.

options.name: bonus_item_copies
options.description: Number of copies of bonus slot unlocks.

options.name: bonus_item_filler
options.description: Number of additional locations for the bonus item slots. This amount is capped to 10, and automatically includes any copies of the bonus item key plus the additional locations here.

options.name: free_starting_items
options.description: If true, the free items should be sent out immediately for locked worlds, or if false the 'Unlock {slot_name}' item will be required. If false, it will require other worlds to be open in sphere 1 instead else there will be no worlds available.

options.name: free_unlocked_world_items
options.description: Adds filler and locations equal to this number, per starting slot of the world.

options.name: random_unlocked_slots
options.description: Number of slots to randomly start with, from the slots that are locked.

options.name: auto_hint_locked_items
options.description: Whether the slotlock client should automatically scout locations in other worlds where its items are if one of its items are hinted.

options.name: associated_worlds
options.description: Allows you to associate a list of worlds with another world. These worlds slot unlocks will then be unlocked at the same time as the primary world. Format `WorldName: [AssociatedWorld1,AssociatedWorld2]`. The maximum number of associated worlds per world is 10, and will cause the associated world to only have 1 copy of its world.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
